questions.subject: maths
questions.question: The value of the determinant |3 2; 1 4| is:

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: If two rows of a determinant are identical, then the value of the determinant is zero.
questions.hint: This is a standard property of determinants.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Using Cramer's Rule, solve: 2x + 3y = 8, 4x - y = 2. Find the value of x.
questions.hint: Find Δ, Δx, Δy. Then x = Δx/Δ

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: A matrix having equal number of rows and columns is called a ______ matrix.
questions.hint: Think about the shape when rows = columns.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Find the inverse of the matrix A = [1 2 3; 0 1 4; 5 6 0] using the adjoint method.
questions.hint: Step 1: Find |A|. Step 2: Find cofactor matrix. Step 3: Transpose to get Adj(A). Step 4: A⁻¹ = Adj(A)/|A|

questions.subject: physics
questions.question: Write the equation of a plane progressive wave and define each symbol used in it.
questions.hint: y = A sin(ωt - kx). Define A, ω, t, k, x.

questions.subject: physics
questions.question: Reverberation time can be reduced by adding soft furnishings and curtains in a room.

questions.question: An ideal voltage source has internal resistance equal to:
questions.hint: An ideal source delivers constant voltage regardless of load.

questions.subject: feee
questions.question: A voltage source of 12V with internal resistance of 4Ω is converted to a current source. What is the value of the current source (in Amperes)?

questions.question: Match the following passive components with their SI units:
questions.hint: R → Ω, C → F, L → H

questions.subject: maths
questions.question:
Evaluate the following 4th order determinant using Chio's method:
|1  2  3  4|
|2  3  1  2|
|1  0  2  3|
|3  1  2  1|
questions.hint: In Chio's method, first element must be 1 (it is). Then form a 3×3 determinant using the formula: new element = |a₁₁ a₁ⱼ; aᵢ₁ aᵢⱼ|
